content.claim: In 2022 OECD PISA, the share of disadvantaged students reaching a good level in at least one basic skill is 12.1%, considerably below EU average of 16.3%; Hungary shows mixed overall PISA performance (mathematics 473 vs OECD 472, reading 473 vs 476, science 486 vs 485)
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Outcome gaps not directly attributable to 6/8-year track mechanism alone
Geographic and socioeconomic factors operate as independent variables
Trend data shows improvement over 2000-2018 period but does not isolate causal driver
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
